hero.title: A Single Solution to Manage AI and Hybrid Infrastructure costs
hero.description: Get end-to-end visibility, chargeback, and forecasting across AI, Cloud, SaaS, and on-prem infrastructure to control costs before they grow.

infrastructure.title: Clear answers for Complex Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: When legacy FinOps tools fail to explain rising usage, margin erosion, and AI costs KoreValue provides the clarity and control for the modern era.
infrastructure.footerText: KoreValue centralizes cost data across LLMs, GPUs, SaaS tools, and private and public cloud, enabling smarter spending, stronger margins, and confident scaling.

visibility.title: One Platform, End-to-End Visibility
visibility.description: Track and manage the true cost of workloads across every environment with clarity.

cards.title: Track AI Workloads End-to-End
cards.description: Monitor the cost of every model call, agent interaction, and GPU hour while enabling detailed visibility for precise chargeback allocation.

cards.title: Handle Complex Shared Resources
cards.description: Allocate costs across Kubernetes clusters, shared databases, and multi-tenant infrastructure effortlessly with KoreValue’s intelligent allocation engine.

cards.title: Unify Multi-Cloud Cost Data
cards.description: Move beyond scattered reports from AWS, Azure, GCP and on-prem with a unified platform that standardizes cost data across environments.

cards.title: Govern Before you Spend
cards.description: Implement budget protections to stop unapproved resource creation before it impacts your billing.

cards.title: Integrate into Existing Workflows
cards.description: Built on an API-first model, it integrates with ERP, ITSM, and BI platforms.

cards.title: Deploy in Days, not Months
cards.description: Integrated discovery automation and virtual tagging start working right away.

demo.heading: NO RISK PROOF OF VALUE
demo.title: Start controlling your AI and Hybrid Environment Costs.
demo.description: Monitor every expense across cloud, on-premise systems, AI and SaaS through a single platform. Avoid unexpected costs with real-time cost distribution, anomaly monitoring and predictive forecasting. Streamline cost management using chargebacks, spending guardrails, and AI-powered insights.

footer.tagline: A cost optimization platform designed for managing AI and Hybrid Infrastructure expenses.
footer.description: KoreValue is an AI-powered FinOps platform designed to help organizations monitor, analyze, and optimize their cloud spending. With real-time cost intelligence, anomaly detection, and multi-cloud insights, we enable teams to make smarter financial decisions and maximize the value of their cloud infrastructure.
